assertions.assertion: A consent page model injects IIdentityServerInteractionService and calls GetAuthorizationContextAsync to get client and scope details
assertions.rationale: ConsentModel injects IIdentityServerInteractionService and calls GetAuthorizationContextAsync.

assertions.assertion: The consent page calls GrantConsentAsync with a ConsentResponse that includes ScopesValuesConsented and RememberConsent = true
assertions.rationale: Uses ScopesValuesConsented and RememberConsent = true correctly.

assertions.assertion: The consent page calls DenyAuthorizationAsync with AuthorizationError.AccessDenied when the user denies consent
The consent page validates returnUrl using IsValidReturnUrl or checks that GetAuthorizationContextAsync returns non-null before redirecting
assertions.rationale: Checks context == null before proceeding, though does not call IsValidReturnUrl separately.
